topic: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among)
keyPointsSummary: 'In' for enclosed spaces/months/years, 'On' for surfaces/days/dates, 'At' for points/exact times
'Under' = below, 'Over' = above, 'Between' = two things, 'Among' = more than two things
Prepositions never change form regardless of subject
Common mistake: mixing up in/on/at for time expressions

quickQuiz.answer: The book is on the table.
The cat is under the table.
The lamp is over the table.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह किताब मेरी और तुम्हारी के बीच है।
quickQuiz.answer: This book is between mine and yours.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह प्रतियोगिता तीन टीमों के बीच है।
quickQuiz.answer: This competition is among three teams.

mustRememberRules: 'In' for enclosed spaces/months/years, 'On' for surfaces/days/dates, 'At' for points/exact times
'Under' = below, 'Over' = above, 'Between' = two things, 'Among' = more than two things
Prepositions never change form regardless of subject
Common mistake: mixing up in/on/at for time expressions
